meaning: n.活力,繁殖力,强烈的性欲vi.强烈欲望,渴望,引起性冲动
examples: It was Fred's lust for glitz and glamour that was driving them apart.
All people, she said, lived their lives in bondage to hunger, pain and lust.
Your job is to just say no to laziness, lust, greed, drug use and the other sins.
Single people, nobody is stopping you from buying the racetrack-friendly Lotus Elise you lust after.
The concept: Create brand lust in youngsters by way of word of mouth (or Internet) among trendsetters.
